videoSnippet.title: Game of the Event? || Jorden vs Nodirbek || FIDE World Rapid Team Championships 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Van Foreest, Jorden (2595) - Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2703)
FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Team Chess Championships 2026 (Chess.com) [10] 2026.06.19
B23 Sicilian, closed

1.e4 c5 2.Nc3 d6 3.Nge2 Nf6 4.g3 g6 5.Bg2 Bg7 6.d3 Nc6 7.O-O O-O 8.h3 Rb8 9.a4 a6 10.f4 Nd7 11.Nd5 b5 12.axb5 axb5 13.Ne3 b4 14.g4 Nd4 15.g5 e6 16.h4 Bb7 17.Ng3 f5 18.gxf6 Qxf6 19.Qg4 h5 20.Qh3 Bh6 21.Ra7 Bxf4 22.Nc4 Bxc1 23.Rxf6 Nxf6 24.c3 Bxb2 25.cxb4 Bc1 26.e5 Bxg2 27.Qxg2 Ng4 28.Qe4 Nf3+ 29.Kg2 Nxh4+ 30.Kg1 d5 31.Qh1 Rxb4 32.Qxh4 Rb1 33.Rb7
